title: Quest 35630 Deep-Fill Sandwich Toastie Maker/Non-Stick Easy Clean/Makes 2 Deep Toasties/Student Kitchen Essential
features: DEEP-FILL SANDWICH TOASTER – This stainless steel, deep-fill sandwich toastie maker is a must-have for any kitchen. Make 2 delicious triangle toasties at once for your family and friends to enjoy, loaded with plenty of your favourite fillings.
AUTO TEMPERATURE CONTROL – The toastie maker is thermostatically controlled to ensure you get perfectly cooked, crisp triangles in minutes.

NON-STICK COATING AND LOCKING CLIP - The quad toaster has a non-stick coating, making it very easy to clean if ever one of your experimental snacks goes not quite as planned. The locking clip and cord storage means your quad toastie maker can be easily stored away upright when not in use, saving space in your kitchen.

COOL TOUCH HANDLE - The stainless-steel body has black cool touch handles and non-slip feet for your comfort and safety. It also has power and ready light indicators, so you know when your delicious creations are ready to enjoy.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Thermostatic Control The automatic temperature control produces perfectly cooked, crisp toasties in minutes. Indicator Lights Ready and power indicator lights feature on the lid, so you know when toasting can start & end. Locking Lid The lid features a clip to securely lock it in place, ideal for safety and compact storage. Non-Stick Plates Each of the toasting plates are non-stick, making it easy to remove toasties and clean afterwards. Cord Storage The sandwich toaster's cord can be wrapped around the base, for compact, neat storage. Next page 1 Thermostatic Control 2 Indicator Lights 3 Locking Lid 4 Non-Stick Plates 5 Cord Storage
